caseStudies.title: Real Results for Real Businesses
caseStudies.subtitle: See how our AI solutions deliver measurable impact across industries

items.title: Document Processing Automation
items.challenge: Tens of thousands of freight documents required manual entry daily, causing high error rates and slow turnaround.
items.solution: Deployed Intelligent OCR system with multi-format document recognition and batch processing.

items.title: AI-Powered Customer Service Upgrade
items.challenge: Peak-hour call queues averaged 8 minutes wait time; manual transcription consumed significant agent hours.
items.solution: Integrated AI Speech Recognition with intelligent routing and real-time transcription.

items.title: AI Agent Workflow Automation
items.challenge: Cross-platform content review, data analytics, and report generation consumed 60% of team capacity.
items.solution: Deployed AI Agent system to automate repetitive workflows with multi-tool integration.

hero.title: Industry Solutions
hero.subtitle: Feifan Tech delivers end-to-end AI solutions across key verticals — from product distribution to custom AI development

overview.title: What We Can Do for You
overview.subtitle: Proven AI products from leading vendors + Feifan's own R&D capabilities for rapid industry deployment

finance.name: Finance & Securities
finance.desc: End-to-end intelligent solutions addressing the three core pain points of financial institutions: customer outreach, compliance control, and risk identification.
usecases: Compliant Outbound Calls: Post-loan collections, wealth management promotion, credit card activation — all with compliant recording and QA
Smart KYC: OCR document recognition + liveness detection, remote onboarding 80% faster
Agent AI Assistant: Real-time script suggestions, emotion detection, and customer profile push

insurance.name: Insurance
insurance.desc: AI technology spans the full insurance lifecycle — from marketing acquisition to claims review — significantly reducing operational costs.
usecases: Smart Outbound Prospecting: Targeted reach for ideal customers, outbound connection rate up 35%
Claims Document OCR: Auto-structuring invoices, medical records, and appraisal reports — claims efficiency up 60%
AI Underwriting Assist: Image recognition + medical NLP for rapid risk assessment

retail.name: Retail Chains
retail.desc: AI customer service, voice quality inspection, and merchandise recognition empower retailers with full omnichannel digital operations.
usecases: AI Customer Service Bot: 24/7 automated handling with >85% issue resolution rate
Voice Agent QA: Automatically identify service compliance risks, QA coverage from 5% to 100%
Product Image Recognition: Store display compliance checks and shelf out-of-stock alerts

government.name: Government & Telecom
government.desc: Document automation, hotline AI routing, and compliant notice broadcasts accelerate public service quality and efficiency.
usecases: Compliant Notice Outbound: Policy notices, payment reminders, event announcements — batch outbound with compliant recording archive
Document OCR Automation: Auto-structuring archived files, reducing manual entry hours by 70%
12345 Hotline AI Routing: Smart ticket routing with 92%+ assignment accuracy

education.name: Education & Training
education.desc: From enrollment outreach to intelligent course content, AI empowers educational institutions to reduce costs and increase effectiveness.
usecases: Smart Enrollment Outbound: Precise follow-up with interested students, enrollment conversion up 30%
Classroom Speech Transcription: Live subtitles and post-class full-text transcripts auto-generated
AI Search & Knowledge Base: Content AI processing to build institution-specific knowledge graphs

industry.name: Industrial & Agricultural
industry.desc: Focusing on manufacturing and modern agriculture, we leverage AI vision, IoT data analytics, and intelligent voice to help enterprises achieve smart equipment management and precision farming—reducing labor costs while improving efficiency and quality.
usecases: Predictive Equipment Maintenance: AI real-time sensor analysis to predict failures before they occur, reducing unplanned downtime
Visual Quality Inspection: High-accuracy AI vision replaces manual inspection with 99%+ defect detection accuracy
Precision Smart Agriculture: IoT sensors + remote sensing for precision irrigation, fertilization, and pest early warning
Agricultural Supply Chain Traceability: OCR + AI enables end-to-end digital tracking from farm to table
Factory Safety Monitoring: AI video analysis detects violations and safety hazards in real time

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to common questions about our services

items.question: What is your typical project timeline?
items.answer: Project timelines vary depending on scope and complexity. Simple websites typically take 2-4 weeks, while complex applications can take 3-6 months. We provide detailed timelines during our initial consultation.

items.question: Do you provide ongoing support and maintenance?
items.answer: Yes, we offer comprehensive support and maintenance packages to ensure your solutions continue to perform optimally. This includes updates, security patches, and technical support.

items.question: What technologies do you specialize in?
items.answer: We specialize in modern web technologies (React, Vue, Node.js), mobile development (React Native, Flutter), cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP), and emerging technologies like AI/ML.

items.question: How do you ensure project quality?
items.answer: We follow rigorous testing procedures, code reviews, and agile development practices. Our quality assurance process includes automated testing, performance optimization, and security audits.
